prompt.content:
Process the journal entries against the 2024 trial balance and output the following:
1. Output the following metrics of the adjusted and unadjusted trial balance
a. EBITDA margins
b. Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue 
c. Debt to equity ratios
Round all values to one decimal place

rubrics.name: States unadjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -96.9% (acceptable range... (ver_9a05a5b9e26f47ffbd9decc29642fc43)

messages.content: States unadjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -96.9% (acceptable range -97.9% to -95.9%).

rubrics.name: States unadjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue is... (ver_41bae7116a0b4b369093198dec9b3ed2)

messages.content: States unadjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue is 30.1% (acceptable range 29.8% to 30.4%).

rubrics.name: States unadjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1 (acceptable range... (ver_024f8453c3b64f419570653589779eaa)

messages.content: States unadjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1 (acceptable range 2.08 to 2.12).

rubrics.name: States adjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -101.8% (acceptable range... (ver_2746badd718b4b9c94181cef938f8fd4)

messages.content: States adjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -101.8% (acceptable range -102.8% to -100.8%).

rubrics.name: States adjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue is... (ver_5542ede81d60417c84032bd4cda2710d)

messages.content: States adjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue is 31.4% (acceptable range 31.1% to 31.7%).

rubrics.name: States adjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1 (acceptable range... (ver_f85d591ff3fa438fa945aebc29463f62)

messages.content: States adjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1 (acceptable range 2.08 to 2.12).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
States unadjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -96.9%
States unadjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue  is 30.1%
States unadjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1

States adjusted trial balance EBITDA margin is -101.8%
States adjusted trial balance Deferred revenue as a % of total revenue  is 31.4%
States adjusted trial balance Debt to equity ratio is 2.1
